scopedSelector.finding: Hero.js line 6 confirmed: document.querySelectorAll('.hero .top-gradient') — scoped to descendants of .hero, not global .top-gradient
scopedSelector.evidence: Read Hero.js directly; page_audit confirmed topGradient (scoped) and topGradientGlobal (global) counts are identical at 1 per section across all 12 instances, meaning .top-gradient elements only exist inside .hero wrappers on this page — no collisions.

resizeObserver.finding: ResizeObserver is still correctly wired. The scoping change only affected the querySelector on line 6 (which element to find). Lines 7-13 are unchanged: gradient.closest('main') || document.querySelector('main') finds the <main> ancestor, updateMaxHeight() sets gradient.style.maxHeight to main.offsetHeight, and new ResizeObserver(updateMaxHeight).observe(main) keeps it dynamic.
resizeObserver.evidence: Source code verification of Hero.js; all three lines 7, 10, 13 are unchanged from pre-fix version. The selector scope narrowing does not affect the ResizeObserver logic.

mainHeightCap.finding: gradient.closest('main') || document.querySelector('main') — the fallback to document.querySelector('main') ensures main is always found regardless of DOM nesting. maxHeight is set to main.offsetHeight in px. This is identical to before the fix.

noJsErrors.finding: common.NO_JS_ERRORS automated check passed (taktician_validate_block_rules). Page returns HTTP 200, no console errors detected during page load.
noJsErrors.evidence: validate_block_rules result: checkId common.NO_JS_ERRORS passed: true

html.message: Content changed (HTML hash differs from previous snapshot — likely due to build deployment updating the built JS)

contentComparison.reason: HTML content changed — running full QA

build.detail: bun run build + lint pass. 0 errors. 10 pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in other blocks (Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, EventHero, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs) — not Hero-related.

lint.detail: No Hero-block lint errors or warnings.

registration.detail: block.json valid: apiVersion 3, naming takt/hero, all file references exist, attribute types valid.

testPageGate.detail: 12 takt/hero instances confirmed on test-hero-block. All wrapped in takt/demo-container.

jsScopeChange.detail: Hero.js selector confirmed as '.hero .top-gradient' (scoped). Previously was '.top-gradient' (global). The Hero.php wrapper applies class 'hero' via theme_block_props — confirmed at Hero.php line 10: 'hero relative overflow-visible' => true. The .top-gradient div is a direct child of that wrapper at line 18. The descendant selector '.hero .top-gradient' is correct.

resizeObserver.detail: ResizeObserver logic unchanged. Observes <main> element and updates gradient maxHeight on resize. Scoping change only affects which gradient elements are targeted, not the resize observation mechanism.

images.detail: 10 images across 12 sections (2 hero instances have no background image — correct for minimal/eyebrow-only variants). All images have alt attributes (decorative bg images use alt='').

headingHierarchy.detail: All 12 hero instances use h1 correctly. No skipped heading levels within blocks.

links.detail: common.LINKS_HREF automated check flagged 3 links with '#' href. These are intentional test-page placeholder CTAs (e.g., 'View Open Positions', 'View Opportunities', 'Contact Us') using # as dummy URLs. Not a block defect.

warnings: Missing @var docblock for camelCase variables: blockVariation, enableQuickNav (pre-existing, minor)
Root wrapper element mismatch TSX InspectorControls vs PHP section (expected — TSX wraps with InspectorControls for editor, PHP outputs section directly)
QuickNavigation TSX/PHP structure difference at depth 1 (pre-existing — editor panel vs frontend elements)
tsxPhpSync.detail: No critical sync errors. The InspectorControls wrapper difference is expected architecture for Gutenberg blocks. PHP function existence check passed.

specCompliance.detail: The single required change (scope .top-gradient selector to .hero .top-gradient in Hero.js) is implemented correctly and completely.

issues.description: Hero.php is missing @var docblock annotations for camelCase variables $blockVariation and $enableQuickNav
issues.fix: Add @var string $blockVariation and @var bool $enableQuickNav to the docblock at the top of Hero.php to satisfy PHP_CodeSniffer WordPress Coding Standards.

passedChecks: Build compiles without errors (0 errors, 0 Hero-specific warnings)
gradient.closest('main') still caps maxHeight to <main> height
No JS errors on page load
No horizontal overflow at any breakpoint
Heading hierarchy correct across all instances

visualObservations.375px: All 12 hero instances stack vertically. Primary variants display centered headings with large text. Secondary variants show left-aligned headings. Background images render correctly with the bottom gradient fade. Quick navigation items are visible below primary hero headings. Long-text hero (instance 9) wraps correctly without overflow. Minimal hero (no image) renders cleanly with gradient background only. Top gradient visible at top of each hero.
visualObservations.768px: Layout expands comfortably at tablet width. Headings increase in size. Background images fill the hero height correctly. Quick navigation tabs are visible and not cramped. Content padding adjusts as expected via sm: breakpoint classes. No layout breakage.
visualObservations.1024px: Layout similar to 768px but slightly wider content area. All variations (primary with quick-nav, primary without, secondary with buttons, secondary without) render correctly. CTA buttons visible in secondary variants.
visualObservations.1440px: Full desktop layout. Primary heroes display large centered headings at full header-0 text size. Secondary heroes display left-aligned content. Max-width container properly constrains content. Quick navigation elements are comfortably spaced. Background images with mask gradient render with smooth fade. All 12 instances render correctly across the page.
